title: gastrodia elatoides
intro: Gastrodia elatoides, also known as the tiger's milk mushroom or tiger's milk seed, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Gastrodia genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve blood circulation. The health benefits associated with Gastrodia elatoides include its potential to treat conditions such as epilepsy, insomnia, and hypertension, as well as its ability to improve cognitive function and memory. In herbal preparations, Gastrodia elatoides is often combined with other plants to create teas, capsules, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
